---
title: "LRPGF08b: Factors associated with gains in TROG receptive grammar (T), treated-only"

format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    theme: cosmo
    number-sections: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-links:
      - repo
---

{{< include _partials/_header.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_setup.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_gate_badge.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_key_findings.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_reading_guide.qmd >}}

## Overview

LRPGF08b is a treated-only **gain-factors** model for TROG receptive grammar (`trog`): what is associated with how much children gain across the three period transitions (ANCOVA - the period post-count given its pre-count - Beta-Binomial logit, child random intercept). It conditions on the own baseline, age, cognitive ability (block design), the upstream DAG skills receptive vocabulary (R) and taught receptive vocabulary (TR), with focal interactions group$\times$ability, group$\times$own-baseline, age$\times$ability.

_Causal labelling (DAG guardrails)._ Once restricted to on-intervention rows the treatment indicator is constant, so it and its interactions are dropped: every coefficient here is an **adjusted association** among the treated (confounded by latent GA), never a treatment effect. Intervention sessions/dose are never conditioned on (a DAG collider). SES is excluded (not a DAG node; statistically redundant).

## Model

Beta-Binomial$(N, \mu\kappa, (1-\mu)\kappa)$ on the period post-count, $N = 32$, with
$\operatorname{logit}\mu = \alpha + \alpha_{\text{period}} + \gamma_{\text{own}}\operatorname{logit}_*(\text{pre}) + \gamma_A A_{\text{std}} + \gamma_{\text{ability}}z(\text{blocks}) + \sum_{s\in\{R,TR\}}\gamma_s\operatorname{logit}_*(s_{\text{pre}}) + \sum\text{interactions} + u_{\text{child}}$. Priors: shared template in `priors.py`.

![Model diagram](model_graph.png){#fig-model .lightbox fig-align="left"}

{{< include _partials/_priors.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_prior_predictive.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_results_factors.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_technical.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_footer.qmd >}}
